violations.text: Various food product were observed stored on the floor in the (walk in cooler in basement). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024
All handwashing sink in the establishment is lacking signage. New Violation. Correct By: 06/21/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black/brown residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service.PIC to wash and sanitize equipment. PIC voluntarily disposed of ice. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024

Various food product were observed stored on the floor in the (produce area, walk in cooler, and walk in freezer ). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces observed with debris: 1.non food contact surfaces of the slicer. 2.honey combs vents in grab n go cooler 3.shelves in walk in cooler 4.pvc pipes in meat cooler New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024

The outside refuse area observed with an accumulation of trash, litter, and/or other debris. Outside refuse area must kept clean as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/21/2024
The wall in the (basement area) area is in poor repair. Observed a hole in wall. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/21/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024

The floors, walls, and ceilings in the walk in cooler and meat cooler, have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/21/2024
